pr_title: Fix max price filter in flight search API (SDLC-11)
pr_body:
This PR addresses the issue observed in SDLC-11 where the flight search API was returning flights priced above the specified max_price instead of those equal to or below it.

### Changes:
- Updated the logic in the search_flights function to retain flights priced <= max_price.
- Added unit tests to ensure the functionality meets acceptance criteria.

### Acceptance Criteria:
- API call GET /flights/search?max_price=<value> returns flights priced at or below <value>.
- Conducted tests with multiple max price values to confirm expected results.
reviewer_summary: Draft PR opened and awaiting human review.
